report.title: WorkflowAI Pro: Collaborative Intelligence & High-Assurance Chat
report.abstract: This module details the collaborative prompt engineering and high-assurance RAG chat systems within WorkflowAI Pro. It specifies the technical implementation of real-time multi-user editing, grounded chat with context provenance, and zero-trust PII redaction middleware to ensure secure knowledge sharing in regulated environments.
report.content:
# 1. Collaborative Prompt Engineering
To scale AGI orchestration, prompt design must move from individual experimentation to institutional collaboration.
## 1.1 Real-time Synchronous Editing - **Sync Protocol**: Utilizing **Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs)** or Operational Transformation for sub-10ms latency in multi-user prompt editing. - **Verification Loop**: Any edit to a "Gold Standard" prompt triggers an automated DSPy/adversarial scan before it is committed to the model registry.
## 1.2 Collaborative Features - **Prompt Library**: A shared, version-controlled repository of GDL-compliant "Expert Personas." - **Commentary & Threading**: Integrating context-aware discussion threads directly into the prompt IDE.
---
# 2. High-Assurance RAG & Grounded Chat
The grounded chat system provides a safe interface for users to interact with institutional knowledge.
## 2.1 Context Provenance Chains - **Merkle-DAG Integrity**: Every retrieval fragment from the Memory Layer is cryptographically hashed. The **Recursive Context Envelope (RCE)** stores the hash chain, allowing the **Experience Layer** to display "Grounding Evidence" for every chatbot claim. - **Citation Anchoring**: Direct UI links between AI claims and the specific source document paragraph.
## 2.2 Zero-Trust PII Redaction Middleware - **Middleware Boundary**: Intercepts the RAG retrieval path before the context enters the **Brain Layer** (GeminiService). - **Control**: Real-time masking of demographic proxies (GDPR/FCRA) and salted SHA-256 edge hashing for sensitive identifiers.
---
# 3. Task & Report Management
## 3.1 AGI Task Decomposition WorkflowAI Pro decomposes high-level user goals into atomic tasks tracked via a state-machine. - **State Schema**: `Pending | Decomposing | Executing | Awaiting-HITL | Complete | SEV-0-Kill`.
## 3.2 AI Safety Report Generator - **Functional Goal**: Automated generation of "Regulator Submission Packs." - **Export Formats**: Enhanced PDF with embedded Merkle-proofs and signed AuditorWORM logs.
